providers.name: Codex / OpenAI subscription
providers.notes: Codex is the live-proven provider. Current codex-max cohort: max-1 selected, max-4 spare fallback, max-2/max-3 quota-exhausted; Spark/mini availability is not generalized to Max.

providers.name: Claude Code subscription
providers.notes: Built-in `claude auth status --json` probe; tier/rate/quota await live route probes.
providers.probeShape: `claude auth status --json` under selected `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR`; no prompt/model call

providers.name: Anthropic API key
providers.notes: API key, not subscription equivalent — `GET /v1/models` identity probe only.
providers.probeShape: `GET https://api.anthropic.com/v1/models` with `x-api-key` and `anthropic-version`; avoid message probes that spend tokens

providers.name: MCP HTTP server
providers.notes: Resource-bound bearer tokens; per-server RFC 9728 metadata discovery.
providers.probeShape: `GET {{SCAFFOLD_MCP_RESOURCE_METADATA_URL}}` without auth for RFC 9728 metadata; `GET {{SCAFFOLD_MCP_RESOURCE_PROBE_URL}}` with resource-bound bearer token for server probe

providers.name: MCP stdio server
providers.notes: Env/config injection; OAuth HTTP authorization profile does not apply.
providers.probeShape: Environment or config injection; MCP HTTP OAuth flow does not apply

providers.name: GitHub
providers.notes: Built-in `identity` probe via `GET /user` with bearer token.

providers.name: Linear
providers.notes: GraphQL `viewer` identity probe; semantic success requires checking `errors`.
providers.probeShape: `POST https://api.linear.app/graphql` with `query { viewer { id name email } }`; OAuth uses bearer auth, personal API keys use raw `Authorization`

providers.name: Figma REST
providers.admission: `admitted_http`; built-in OAuth `identity`, PAT `identity-pat`, and plan-token `file-metadata-plan` probes
providers.probeShape: `GET https://api.figma.com/v1/me` with OAuth bearer token and `current_user:read`; PATs use `X-Figma-Token`; plan access tokens use `GET /v1/files/{{SCAFFOLD_FIGMA_PLAN_FILE_KEY}}/meta` with `file_metadata:read`

providers.name: Figma Remote MCP
providers.notes: Treat as MCP HTTP resource, not as Figma REST.
providers.probeShape: Treat as MCP HTTP resource, not as Figma REST

providers.name: Vercel
providers.probeShape: `GET https://api.vercel.com/v2/user`; token metadata endpoint and semantic `softBlock` body checks are later optional refinements

providers.name: FlakeHub / Determinate
providers.notes: `determinate-nixd status` command-first probe; direct HTTP unadmitted.
providers.probeShape: `determinate-nixd status`; `fh status` remains an equivalent future CLI path when installed
